OFF CALENDAR. IN LIGHT OF THE DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION, ENTERED NOVEMBER 12, 2025, THE COURT FINDS THE INSTANT REQUEST MOOT AND, ACCORDINGLY ORDERS IT OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSE DE DIOS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Before the court is an unopposed Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Matthew Treybig and Quill & Arrow, LLP, counsel of record for Plaintiff Jose Juan de Dios. OFF CALENDAR.

In light of the dismissal of the entire action, entered November 12, 2025, the court finds the instant request moot and, accordingly orders it off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2025 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Set For Trial On Nov-17-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
